item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":null,"rationale":"The assistant treated the three prior changes as ordinary related context for an execution plan, not as repeated same-means repair pressure. It did not fire triage, invoke Anti-Spiral/3L5S, or stop to over-methodize; it directly provided practical implementation and validation steps for adding the print button."}
